intro:

However, I can suggest a similar plant, "Calea z (Calendula sinemariensis is a synonym for Calea  z. (Calea sinemariensis))", and provide the information you requested.

Calea sinemariensis, also known as Mexican Gold Marigold, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family.

The health benefits of Calea sinemariensis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against infections.

The bioactive constituents of Calea sinemariensis include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been found to contribute to its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Calea sinemariensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, skin irritations, and respiratory problems.
